heading: Indemnity obligation of Commission; incorporation by reference in deed
label: 2363 Indemnity obligation of Commission; incorporation by reference in deed
text: For a period of not more than fifteen years after , or, in the case of Los Alamos, not more than fifteen years after the date it is included within this chapter, the Commission shall indemnify the purchaser (except a purchaser taking advantage of the provisions of ), and any successor in title, of any such single family or duplex house as set forth in this subchapter. This indemnity shall be deemed to be incorporated in the deeds given on the sale of Government-owned houses. One person may not invoke the indemnity in respect of more than one house.August 4, 1955section 2326(d) of this title
notes: Amendments1962— inserted “or, in the case of Los Alamos, not more than fifteen years after the date it is included within this chapter” after “,”.Pub. L. 87–719August 4, 1955
Transfer of FunctionsAtomic Energy Commission abolished and functions transferred by sections 5814 and 5841 of this title. See also Transfer of Functions notes set out under those sections.
